zh.lifeSummary: 當Lleuki verch Gwerystan於大約0982年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent30歲，母親Nesta ferch Cadell29歲。她和Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor至少有4個兒子。她去世於1041年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lleuki verch Gwerystan于大约0982年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent30岁，母亲Nesta ferch Cadell29岁。她和Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor至少有4个儿子。她去世于1041年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lleuki verch Gwerystan was born about 0982, in Wales, her father, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, was 30 and her mother, Nesta ferch Cadell, was 29. She had at least 4 sons with Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. She died in 1041, at the age of 60.

fr.Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales: Denbigh, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lleuki verch Gwerystan est née environ 0982, à Galles, son père, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Nesta ferch Cadell, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. Elle est décédée en 1041, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lleuki verch Gwerystan um 0982 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent 30 und ihre Mutter Nesta ferch Cadell 29. Sie hatte mit Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1041 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lleuki verch Gwerystan è nata il circa 0982 nel Galles, sua padre, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Nesta ferch Cadell, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. Morì nel 1041, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lleuki verch Gwerystanが約0982年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwentは30歳，母Nesta ferch Cadellは29歳であった。彼女はLlywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevorとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1041年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lleuki verch Gwerystan(이)가 대략 0982년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nesta ferch Cadell(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1041년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lleuki verch Gwerystan nasceu aproximadamente 0982, em Gales, seu pai, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Nesta ferch Cadell, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. Ela faleceu em 1041, com 60 anos.

ro.Denbigh, Denbighshire, Wales: Denbigh, Denbighshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lleuki verch Gwerystan родилась около 0982 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Nesta ferch Cadell, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. Она умерла в 1041 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lleuki verch Gwerystan nació aproximadamente 0982, en Gales, su papá, Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Nesta ferch Cadell, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Llywarch ap Lluddocca ap Tudor Trevor. Murió en 1041, a la edad de 60 años.
